Auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
Auth.passwordUppercase: Must contain at least one uppercase letter (A-Z).
Auth.passwordLowercase: Must contain at least one lowercase letter (a-z).

Auth.passwordSpecial: Must contain at least one special character (!@#).
Auth.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters.

Auth.usernameFormat: Please enter a valid username format.

Auth.registerSubtitle: Sign up to get started with your new account.
Auth.loginError: Login failed. Please check your credentials and try again.
Auth.otpSubtitle: We have sent a {length}-digit code to {email}.
Auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your registered email address and we'll send you a password reset code.
Auth.verifyResetOtpSubtitle: Enter the {length}-digit code we sent to {email}.
Auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Choose a new, secure password for your account.
Auth.tokenInvalid: Please enter a valid verification code.
Auth.resetSuccessDesc: Your password has been successfully updated. You can now log in.
Auth.forgotPasswordError: Could not process the password reset request.

error.bad_request: Invalid request. Please check the information provided.
error.validation: There are validation errors. Please correct the fields below.
error.unauthorized: You must be logged in to access this resource.
error.token_expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
error.invalid_token: The token provided is invalid or corrupted.
error.invalid_credentials: Login failed. Please check your credentials and try again.
error.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
error.email_not_verified: Please verify your email address to use your account.
error.account_disabled: Your account has been suspended or disabled.
error.not_found: The requested resource could not be found.
error.user_already_exists: This email or username is already registered.
error.rate_limit_exceeded: You have sent too many requests. Please wait a moment.
error.internal_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
error.gateway_timeout: The server did not respond in time. Please try again later.

username.Size: Username must be between 3 and 30 characters.
username.Pattern: Username can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and dots.

usernameOrEmail.NotBlank: Username or email cannot be empty.
usernameOrEmail.Size: Username or email is too long.

email.Email: Please enter a valid email address.

password.Size: Password must be between 8 and 100 characters.
password.Pattern: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character.

token.Size: Verification code must be exactly 6 digits.
token.Pattern: Verification code must contain only numbers.

otp.Pattern: Verification code must contain only numbers.
